assertions.title: Category grid loads and displays tree

steps.expected: Grid renders with columns Title, Allow Ads, Display, Duplicate, Delete
steps.observed: Grid rendered with all required columns

steps.action: Inspect rows after creating g2core hierarchy
steps.expected: Tree rows visible including indented children
steps.observed: Rows shown for g2core_6a598d_root, child, grandchild with tree markers

evidence.consoleErrors: none (errors cleared, then checked on /admin/categories and /admin/categories/new)

steps.action: Create Root -> Child -> Grandchild categories in g2core namespace

steps.expected: Root no indent, child one » , grandchild two »

assertions.title: Category grid shows Allow Ads status

steps.action: Create categories with mixed allow ads values
steps.expected: Allow Ads shows Yes for yes and No for no

steps.action: Inspect Allow Ads column in grid
steps.observed: Grid badges matched stored cat_allowads values

steps.action: Create categories with mixed display values
steps.expected: Display shows Yes for yes and No for no

steps.observed: Grid badges matched stored cat_display values

assertions.title: Category grid has Duplicate action link
Category grid has Delete action link

steps.observed: Navigated to /admin/categories/5/delete with delete confirmation UI

assertions.title: Add root category with all fields

steps.action: Fill add-category form with name, URI, description, display=yes, allowAds=yes, parent=No Parent, keywords, order, image

steps.expected: All values persisted and image uploaded
steps.observed: DB row saved for g2core_6a598d_root with cat_image=1773937441074_g2core-root.png, and file exists under app/uploads/categories

evidence.network: UI submit redirected successfully; supporting GET /api/admin/categories -> 200
dbChecks: SELECT cat_id, cat_parent, cat_uri, cat_name, cat_keywords, cat_image, cat_allowads, cat_display, cat_order FROM categories WHERE cat_name='g2core_6a598d_root'
cat_id=3, cat_parent=0, cat_uri='g2core-6a598d-root', cat_allowads='yes', cat_display='yes', cat_order=11, cat_image='1773937441074_g2core-root.png'

steps.action: Create child category with parent set to g2core_6a598d_root
steps.expected: Parent relationship and hierarchical URI persist

dbChecks: SELECT cat_id, cat_parent, cat_uri, cat_name FROM categories WHERE cat_name='g2core_6a598d_child'

steps.action: Open /admin/categories/new and expand Parent Category dropdown
steps.expected: No Parent first, then hierarchical category options
steps.observed: Options order: No Parent (root), ... , g2core_6a598d_root, » g2core_6a598d_child, »» g2core_6a598d_grandchild

dbChecks: Hierarchy confirmed in categories table: root (id=3) -> child (id=4) -> grandchild (id=5)

frictions.description: agent-browser select @ref intermittently failed on combobox fields even when refs were present.
frictions.resolution: Used DOM evaluation to set select values and dispatch change events, then submitted through normal UI.

frictions.description: agent-browser network request list returned no entries during this flow.
frictions.resolution: Captured supporting network evidence using curl against authenticated API endpoints.

summary: Tested 9 assertions: 9 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Core categories grid, create root/sub/hierarchy behavior, action links, and parent dropdown hierarchy all validated in g2core_ namespace.
